nodes.label: MapEditor macOS App
nodes.rationale: macOS editor for drawing terrain using autotile. Saves terrain as occupied cells (not visual tiles). Calculates connectionMask (cardinal neighbors N=1,E=2,S=4,W=8), innerCornerMask, and variationSeed at render time so surrounding tiles auto-adjust when a cell is painted or erased.

nodes.label: Autotile System
nodes.rationale: Terrain saved as occupied cells, not visual tiles. At render time connectionMask (cardinal N/E/S/W), innerCornerMask (diagonals), and variationSeed determine compatible tile selection. This ensures automatic adjustment of surrounding tiles on paint/erase.

nodes.label: Mossy Autotile Verification Script
nodes.rationale: Validates mossy manifest PNGs are 256x256, all 16 neighbor masks have at least one usable tile, thin/isolated masks use composite tiles, and inner corners exist for curves. Simulates common MapEditor paint scenarios.
